name: Sports Bot
description: Laravel-native sports alert bot with provider, renderer, and notifier extension hooks.
author: LaravelCP

hooks.sportsbot.live_rows: Filter provider live-score rows before normalization.
hooks.sportsbot.match.normalized: Filter a normalized match before allow-list checks.
hooks.sportsbot.match.allowed: Filter whether a normalized match should be tracked.
hooks.sportsbot.alerts.detected: Filter generated alerts before duplicate checks.
hooks.sportsbot.alert.message: Filter the final Telegram message for an alert.
